metadata.name: 漫蛙
metadata.description: 漫蛙 - 需要科学网络，BL为主

actions.code: (() => { var mangas = []; var items = document.querySelectorAll('#rankList_2 > a'); for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){ var item=items[i]; var title = item.getAttribute('title') || ''; var url = item.getAttribute('href') || ''; var img = item.querySelector('img'); var cover = img ? (img.getAttribute('data-original') || img.getAttribute('src') || '') : ''; if (title && url) { mangas.push({ id: url, title: title, cover: cover }); }} return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

(() => { var mangas = []; var items = document.querySelectorAll('ul.manga-list-2 > li'); for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){ var item=items[i]; var titleEl = item.querySelector('p.manga-list-2-title'); var linkEl = item.querySelector('a'); var imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); var title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText : ''; var url = linkEl ? linkEl.getAttribute('href') : ''; var cover = imgEl ? (imgEl.getAttribute('src') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || '') : ''; if (title && url) { mangas.push({ id: url, title: title, cover: cover }); }} return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

(() => { var mangas = []; var bookListItems = document.querySelectorAll('ul.book-list > li'); if (bookListItems.length > 0) { for(var i=0;i<bookListItems.length;i++){ var item=bookListItems[i]; var titleEl = item.querySelector('p.book-list-info-title'); var linkEl = item.querySelector('a'); var imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); var title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText : ''; var url = linkEl ? linkEl.getAttribute('href') : ''; var cover = imgEl ? (imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || imgEl.getAttribute('src') || '') : ''; if (title && url) { mangas.push({ id: url, title: title, cover: cover }); }} } else { var mangaListItems = document.querySelectorAll('ul.manga-list-2 > li'); for(var j=0;j<mangaListItems.length;j++){ var item2=mangaListItems[j]; var titleEl2 = item2.querySelector('p.manga-list-2-title'); var linkEl2 = item2.querySelector('a'); var imgEl2 = item2.querySelector('img'); var title2 = titleEl2 ? titleEl2.innerText : ''; var url2 = linkEl2 ? linkEl2.getAttribute('href') : ''; var cover2 = imgEl2 ? (imgEl2.getAttribute('src') || imgEl2.getAttribute('data-original') || '') : ''; if (title2 && url2) { mangas.push({ id: url2, title: title2, cover: cover2 }); }} } return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

(() => { var mangas = []; var items = document.querySelectorAll('ul.manga-list-2 > li'); for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){ var item=items[i]; var titleEl = item.querySelector('p.manga-list-2-title'); var linkEl = item.querySelector('a'); var imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); var title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText : ''; var url = linkEl ? linkEl.getAttribute('href') : ''; var cover = imgEl ? (imgEl.getAttribute('src') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || '') : ''; if (title && url) { mangas.push({ id: url, title: title, cover: cover }); }} var pagination = document.querySelectorAll('ul.pagination2 > li'); var hasNext = pagination.length > 0 && pagination[pagination.length - 1].innerText === '下一页'; return JSON.stringify({ mangas: mangas, hasNextPage: hasNext }); })();

(() => { let raw = '{{mangaId}}'; if (raw.startsWith('http')) { try { raw = new URL(raw).pathname; } catch (e) {} } raw = raw.replace(/\/+$/, '').replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (!raw) return '{{baseUrl}}'; if (raw.startsWith('book/')) return '{{baseUrl}}/' + raw; if (/^\d+$/.test(raw)) return '{{baseUrl}}/book/' + raw; return '{{baseUrl}}/' + raw; })();

(() => { const titleEl = document.querySelector('.detail-main-info-title'); if (!titleEl) return JSON.stringify({ title: '', cover: '', author: '', status: 'unknown', genre: '', description: '' }); const title = titleEl.textContent?.trim() || ''; const coverEl = document.querySelector('div.detail-main-cover img'); const cover = coverEl ? (coverEl.getAttribute('data-original') || coverEl.getAttribute('src') || '') : ''; const authorEl = document.querySelector('p.detail-main-info-author span.detail-main-info-value a'); const author = authorEl?.textContent?.trim() || ''; const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('p.detail-main-info-author')).map(el => el.textContent?.trim() || ''); let status = 'unknown'; const statusText = rows.find(text => text.includes('更新状态') || text.includes('狀態')) || ''; if (statusText.includes('连载') || statusText.includes('連載')) status = 'ongoing'; else if (statusText.includes('完结') || statusText.includes('完結')) status = 'completed'; const genre = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div.detail-main-info-class a.info-tag, div.detail-main-info-class span.info-tag-span')).map(el => el.textContent?.trim() || '').filter(Boolean).join(', '); const description = document.querySelector('#detail p.detail-desc')?.textContent?.trim() || ''; return JSON.stringify({ title, cover, author, status, genre, description }); })();

getMangaDetailWithChapters.description: 获取漫画详情和章节列表

actions.code: (() => { let raw = '{{mangaId}}'; if (raw.startsWith('http')) { try { raw = new URL(raw).pathname; } catch (e) {} } raw = raw.replace(/\/+$/, '').replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (!raw) return '{{baseUrl}}'; if (raw.startsWith('book/')) return '{{baseUrl}}/' + raw; if (/^\d+$/.test(raw)) return '{{baseUrl}}/book/' + raw; return '{{baseUrl}}/' + raw; })();

(() => { const titleEl = document.querySelector('.detail-main-info-title'); if (!titleEl) return JSON.stringify({ title: '', cover: '', author: '', status: 'unknown', genre: '', description: '' }); const title = titleEl.textContent?.trim() || ''; const coverEl = document.querySelector('div.detail-main-cover img'); const cover = coverEl ? (coverEl.getAttribute('data-original') || coverEl.getAttribute('src') || '') : ''; const authorEl = document.querySelector('p.detail-main-info-author span.detail-main-info-value a'); const author = authorEl?.textContent?.trim() || ''; const rows = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('p.detail-main-info-author')).map(el => el.textContent?.trim() || ''); let status = 'unknown'; const statusText = rows.find(text => text.includes('更新状态') || text.includes('狀態')) || ''; if (statusText.includes('连载') || statusText.includes('連載')) status = 'ongoing'; else if (statusText.includes('完结') || statusText.includes('完結')) status = 'completed'; const genre = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('div.detail-main-info-class a.info-tag, div.detail-main-info-class span.info-tag-span')).map(el => el.textContent?.trim() || '').filter(Boolean).join(', '); const description = document.querySelector('#detail p.detail-desc')?.textContent?.trim() || ''; return JSON.stringify({ title, cover, author, status, genre, description }); })();

(() => { const chapters = []; const links = document.querySelectorAll('ul#detail-list-select > li > a'); links.forEach(link => { const url = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; const title = link.textContent?.trim() || ''; if (url && title) chapters.push({ id: url, title, url }); }); chapters.reverse(); return JSON.stringify(chapters); })();
actions.description: 提取章节列表（按时间正序）

actions.code: (() => { let raw = '{{mangaId}}'; if (raw.startsWith('http')) { try { raw = new URL(raw).pathname; } catch (e) {} } raw = raw.replace(/\/+$/, '').replace(/^\/+/, ''); if (!raw) return '{{baseUrl}}'; if (raw.startsWith('book/')) return '{{baseUrl}}/' + raw; if (/^\d+$/.test(raw)) return '{{baseUrl}}/book/' + raw; return '{{baseUrl}}/' + raw; })();

(() => { const chapters = []; const links = document.querySelectorAll('ul#detail-list-select > li > a'); links.forEach(link => { const url = link.getAttribute('href') || ''; const title = link.textContent?.trim() || ''; if (url && title) chapters.push({ id: url, title, url }); }); chapters.reverse(); return JSON.stringify(chapters); })();
actions.description: 提取章节列表（按时间正序）

actions.code: (() => { const pages = []; const images = document.querySelectorAll('#cp_img > div.img-content > img[data-r-src], #cp_img img[data-r-src]'); images.forEach((img, index) => { const url = img.getAttribute('data-r-src') || img.getAttribute('src') || ''; if (url && !url.startsWith('data:')) pages.push({ index, url }); }); return JSON.stringify(pages); })();

filter.description: 筛选漫画（支持状态、类型、地区、排序筛选）

actions.code: (() => { var mangas = []; var items = document.querySelectorAll('ul.manga-list-2 > li'); for(var i=0;i<items.length;i++){ var item=items[i]; var titleEl = item.querySelector('p.manga-list-2-title'); var linkEl = item.querySelector('a'); var imgEl = item.querySelector('img'); var title = titleEl ? titleEl.innerText : ''; var url = linkEl ? linkEl.getAttribute('href') : ''; var cover = imgEl ? (imgEl.getAttribute('src') || imgEl.getAttribute('data-original') || '') : ''; if (title && url) { mangas.push({ id: url, title: title, cover: cover }); }} return JSON.stringify(mangas); })();

notes.imageDecryption: 部分图片需要AES解密，key为'my2ecret782ecret'，模式为AES/CBC/NOPADDING
notes.mirrorUpdate: 镜像URL可能会动态更新，重定向URL为 https://fuwt.cc/mw666

changes: 初始版本，移植自keiyoushi漫蛙扩展
支持热门、最新、搜索功能
支持多条件筛选（状态、类型、地区、排序）
